atr_based_2x.note: stop already 2× ATR → same as fixed-fractional

half_kelly.note: uses tactical R:R; exceeds the 1% rule and is capped out

rationale: 1% rule allows 65 sh ($14300.0, 14.3% — over the 10% cap); the max-position 10% rule is the strictest, holding the position to 45 sh ($9900.0). Round down. Final open risk $684.45 = 0.68% of equity.
source: position-sizer (fixed-fractional / ATR / half-Kelly, strictest-constraint-wins, round down)
